scripts.build: pnpm --filter @conference/business-modules build && pnpm --filter @conference/dsl-runtime build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @conference/business-modules build && pnpm --filter @conference/dsl-runtime build && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @conference/business-modules build && pnpm --filter @conference/dsl-runtime build && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @conference/business-modules build && pnpm --filter @conference/dsl-runtime build && tsx src/__tests__/module-compiler.spec.ts
